Unit suite enforces >=95 percent branch coverage for contract engine modules.\n2. All failures include structured assertion logs with clause IDs.\n3. Property tests validate monotonicity/sanity constraints on confidence outputs.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:54.952374968Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T02:43:11.763470053Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T02:43:11.763450256Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["contracts","opentui-import","test","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:54.952374968Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:01.801955735Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:02.263004393Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:02.714834271Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:03.175469354Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.1.7","title":"task(opentui-import contracts tests): E2E contract gate script with detailed structured logging","description":"Objective: Create an end-to-end script that runs contract validation against representative migration manifests and blocks CI on contract violations.\n\nScript expectations:\n- Inputs: staged artifacts + manifest + expected policy table.\n- Outputs: pass/fail verdict, per-clause report, JSONL execution trace.\n- Logging: timestamped stage spans, clause IDs, risk level transitions, remediation hints.\n\nAcceptance criteria:\n1. Script runs non-interactively in CI and local environments.\n2. Logs are replay-friendly and include deterministic run IDs and hashes.\n3. At least one intentionally failing fixture verifies red-path diagnostics.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:55.447139980Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T02:59:43.041154353Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T02:59:43.041134747Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["contracts","e2e","opentui-import","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:55.447139980Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:03.640396018Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:04.897432371Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.10","title":"epic(opentui-import): Alien-graveyard uplift for synthesis, formal assurance, and shadow-run adoption","description":"Background:
This epic operationalizes alien-graveyard + alien-artifact-coding methods so OpenTUI→FrankenTUI migration is not heuristic glue code, but a formally constrained, executable, replayable decision system with strong safety/fallback behavior.

North star:
Convert advanced math and systems ideas into production-grade, deterministic migration policy that improves outcomes while remaining auditable and operator-safe.

Capability pillars:
1) Contracts + provenance:
- Contracts-as-code engine, artifact-graph IDs, claim/evidence/policy/trace linkage.
2) Formal decision core:
- Closed-form Bayesian posterior + expected-loss policy + formal guarantee wrappers.
3) Graveyard executable workflow:
- Symptom-router/Fast-Start harvesting, composability/risk matrices, entry-header/graduation schema, graveyardctl verification.
4) Robust artifact-coding extensions:
- Dependence-aware conjugate fusion, sequential FDR wealth control, minimal-flip counterfactual audits, graceful degradation compiler, assumption applicability checker, L0-L3 galaxy-brain contracts.
5) Testing and proof gates:
- Deep unit/property suites + end-to-end gauntlets with deterministic replay artifacts and red-path safety diagnostics.
6) Release enforcement:
- RC promotion blocked unless all mandatory alien + optimization + certification gauntlets pass and artifact clauses are machine-valid.

Execution map (high level):
- Foundation + governance track: .10.1-.10.20
- Formal inference/guarantee track: .10.21-.10.28
- Graveyard executable track: .10.29-.10.37
- Advanced artifact-coding track: .10.38-.10.45

Success criteria:
1) Every advanced primitive/controller has budgeted mode, deterministic fallback, and replayable evidence traces.
2) Recommendation contracts are machine-linted for EV/tier, metadata schema, risk countermeasures, guarantees, comparator, rollback, and demo linkage completeness.
3) Mandatory gauntlets pass for route→rank→contract→verify→demo→release pipelines before RC promotion.
4) CI fails on missing artifacts, unsafe composition, violated assumptions, invalid guarantees, or policy-breaking optimizations.
5) Operators can reconstruct any migration decision (and nearest counterfactual flip) from structured logs alone.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:38.728311183Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-24T22:46:25.850012731Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-graveyard","formal-methods","opentui-import"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:38.728311183Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Contract clauses compile into executable validators used in CI and runtime gating.\n2. Artifact graph IDs (claim_id, evidence_id, policy_id, trace_id) are emitted consistently across pipeline stages.\n3. Missing linkage fails validation; no orphan claims allowed.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:39.187036875Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T04:09:40.748534798Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-graveyard","artifact-graph","contracts-as-code","opentui-import"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:10.839989484Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:11.301910666Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:39.187036875Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","title":"task(opentui-import alien tests): Unit tests for contracts-as-code, synthesis, abstract interpretation, and controller guards","description":"Objective: Create comprehensive unit/property test suite for alien-uplift kernels: contracts-as-code, CEGIS bounds/fallback, e-graph extraction, abstract interpretation soundness, metamorphic oracles, controller guards, Bayesian posterior core, expected-loss solver, guarantee wrappers, VOI planner, and hazard/change-point models.

Acceptance criteria:
1. Tests include adversarial/malformed inputs and explicit graceful-degradation behavior checks.
2. Deterministic replay of failing seeds/counterexamples is mandatory.
3. Logs include kernel_id, equation_id, policy_id, budget_state, posterior_hash, guarantee_status, and proof/witness hashes.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:43.317237994Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-24T22:27:33.960241610Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-graveyard","opentui-import","test","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:20:10.392441538Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:43.317237994Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:30.252007846Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:34.256302920Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:30.696600366Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:31.134422158Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:31.574557271Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:32.019819596Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:32.467209245Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02  {"id":"bd-3bxhj.10.11","title":"task(opentui-import alien tests): E2E alien-uplift validation pipeline with full structured evidence ledger","description":"Objective: Implement end-to-end alien-uplift script that runs shadow-run checks, concolic/metamorphic discovery, synthesis fallback tests, controller-interference checks, posterior/loss decision traces, formal guarantee checks, and quality-bar validation in one reproducible pipeline.

Acceptance criteria:
1. Script emits complete JSONL evidence ledger with artifact graph IDs and replay commands.
2. Red-path fixtures verify each fallback mode, assumption-violation response, and gate-fail behavior.
3. Pipeline is CI-ready and required by release-candidate promotion.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:43.791211692Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-24T22:27:34.651616989Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-graveyard","e2e","opentui-import","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.11","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:20:15.417731648Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.11","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:43.791211692Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.11","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:34.710947365Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.11","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.2.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:21:51.885427129Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.11","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.2.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:21:52.336810652Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.11","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.3.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:21:17.641867960Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.11","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.4.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:21:17.205878476Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.11","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.5.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:21:18.091780929Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.11","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.6.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:21:18.572896582Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.11","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.6.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:35.173997130Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.10.12","title":"task(opentui-import alien): Perform ecosystem scan and crate adoption decision records for every S/A uplift candidate","description":"Objective: Satisfy the alien-graveyard ecosystem-scan rule before shipping any S/A uplift. For each candidate primitive (contracts-as-code, CEGIS, e-graph, abstract interpretation, concolic, metamorphic, shadow-run, controller-interference guardrails), produce an explicit adopt-vs-build record tied to FrankenTUI constraints.\n\nRequired outputs:\n- Machine-readable scan ledger (candidate_id, crate candidates, benchmark deltas, determinism risk, unsafe policy fit, license/IP posture, portability, final decision).\n- Human summary mapping each decision to the migration architecture (ingestion/IR/translation/certification path).\n\nAcceptance criteria:\n1. Every S/A candidate has an ecosystem_scan record with at least one considered Rust crate (or explicit none-found statement).\n2. Each reject decision includes constraint-grounded rationale (performance, determinism, unsafe-policy, license, portability) and fallback plan.\n3. Planner/governance gates consume this ledger; no S/A alien milestone can be marked passing without scan coverage.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:11:24.936433899Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-24T22:27:31.987498002Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-graveyard","governance","opentui-import","research"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.12","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:26.222361036Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.12","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:11:24.936433899Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.12","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:27:31.987392775Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.2.3","title":"task(opentui-import ingestion): Build module graph and migration entrypoint detector","description":"Objective: Construct complete project module graph and identify migration entrypoints for OpenTUI app roots and critical feature surfaces.\n\nAcceptance criteria:\n1.  {"id":"bd-3bxhj.2.4","title":"task(opentui-import ingestion): Implement TSX/JSX parser pipeline with typed AST and symbol table","description":"Objective: Parse TSX/JSX into a canonical typed AST layer with resolved symbols for components, hooks, and event handlers.\n\nAcceptance criteria:\n1. Parser handles common OpenTUI patterns, fragments, generics, and inferred props.\n2. Symbol table links identifiers to declarations across module boundaries.\n3. Recoverable parse errors emit structured diagnostics without crashing pipeline.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"VioletOak","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:29:35.713395504Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T04:14:46.245421970Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T04:14:46.245402023Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ast","opentui-import","parser"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:29:35.713395504Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:07.644983923Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.3","title":"epic(opentui-import): Canonical IR and semantic normalization","description":"## Background
Normalize extracted semantics into a canonical IR that captures intent independent of OpenTUI implementation details.

## Scope
- IR schema and invariants for state, interaction, layout, style, and effects.
- Lowering + normalization passes with deterministic ordering/idempotence guarantees.
- Intent graph inference (layout/focus/interaction).
- Effect canonicalization into deterministic command/subscription semantics.
- IR versioning/explainer tooling plus unit/E2E determinism validation.

## Success Criteria
1. IR passes are deterministic and idempotent for fixed inputs and configs.
2. Every normalized artifact is provenance-linked to upstream extraction evidence.
3. Effect and async semantics map cleanly into deterministic runtime abstractions.
4. Ingestion-to-IR E2E traces are replayable with stage-level hashes.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:19.821714463Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-24T22:22:55.372741464Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["compiler","ir","opentui-import"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:19.821714463Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.3.1","title":"task(opentui-import IR): Design canonical migration IR schema and invariants","description":"Objective: Define canonical IR capturing view tree, state graph, event transitions, effects, style intent, capabilities, and accessibility semantics independent of source syntax.\n\nAcceptance criteria:\n1. IR schema is versioned and machine-validated.\n2. Invariants are explicit (acyclic ownership, deterministic ordering, stable IDs).\n3. Schema supports provenance links back to source constructs for diagnostics.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:30:01.555940220Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T04:23:42.642835264Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T04:23:42.642814205Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ir","opentui-import","schema"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:15.022376055Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:15.486655395Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:30:01.555940220Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
